# Example Rust project — requirements catalog

### RUST-001 — Accepts a valid token
- Section: §2.1
- Keyword: MUST | Actor: Lib

### RUST-002 — Rejects an expired token
- Section: §2.2
- Keyword: MUST | Actor: Lib

### RUST-003 — Streams output incrementally
- Section: §3.1
- Keyword: SHOULD | Actor: Lib
